title: Backend Engineer
score_reasoning: Your Python and Go experience align well with Via's backend stack, and their microservices-heavy architecture directly matches your distributed systems expertise. However, the role is based in Tel Aviv with hybrid work anchored there—a significant geographic mismatch for your Berlin base and remote-first preference. While the company (transportation/scale-up) fits your target industries, the location constraint and slightly below-target seniority (3+ years vs. your senior-level trajectory) lower the overall fit. The work is meaningful and scalable, but the timezone and commute barriers make this a poor practical match despite the technical alignment.

red_flags: On-site hybrid anchored to Tel Aviv, not remote-compatible with Berlin base
>5h timezone mismatch (Israel UTC+2/+3 vs. Germany UTC+1/+2)
Seniority titled 'Backend Engineer' (mid-level) vs. your senior-level current role
No explicit mention of AWS or modern cloud infrastructure in job description
